channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 XxHuberrr/Mineradio (6063 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: XxHuberrr

📝 Repository: XxHuberrr/Mineradio

item.title: 📝 op7418/guizang-social-card-skill (4013 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: op7418

📝 Repository: op7418/guizang-social-card-skill

📄 Descrizione: 🪧 Claude Code / Codex skill — generate Xiaohongshu carousels & WeChat 21:9+1:1 cover pairs. Editorial × Swiss visual systems, 28 layouts, 10 themes, single-file HTML → PNG. 小红书图文 + 公众号封面对

🍴 Forks: 345

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

item.title: 📝 nexu-io/html-video (3517 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/html-video

📄 Descrizione: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.

⭐ Stelle: 3517

🍴 Forks: 437

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent apache-2 coding-agent css ffmpeg html html-to-video hyperframes mp4 open-design open-source programmatic-video video video-as-code video-generation

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-27T02:08:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-25T05:59:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 zeropl/2FA (474 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zeropl

📝 Repository: zeropl/2FA

📄 Descrizione: 2FA 在你的浏览器里把一个 2FA 密钥算成实时的 6 位验证码。没有服务器、不用注册、没有数据库——每个"账号"就是一条可收藏的网址，密钥藏在它的 # 片段里（浏览器永远不会把 # 片段发到网络上）。

⭐ Stelle: 474

🍴 Forks: 51

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: 2fa

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-17T07:08:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-03T14:11:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 TexasBedouin/vibe-check (465 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TexasBedouin

📝 Repository: TexasBedouin/vibe-check

📄 Descrizione: By a 12-year product manager who builds 0-to-1: takes a beginner from a vague idea to a buildable plan, then guides the build (GitHub basics, clean-code habits, a verify-and-iterate loop, a checkup for the mess). For Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity. grill-me is for engineers, vibe-check is for everyone else.

item.description:
👤 Owner: cxq0517

📝 Repository: cxq0517/htmltool2

📄 Descrizione: 最简洁的html文字编辑器，可以直接修改html上的文字，并保证原渲染效果不变。现在可以随时微调你用AI生成的html格式的ppt、简历、信息图等各种html文件。The simplest HTML text editor. Edit text directly on an HTML page while preserving the original rendered appearance. Now you can quickly fine-tune any AI-generated HTML file, such as presentations, resumes, infographics, and more.
